nodes.name: 白腹棕尾蜂鸟
nodes.summary: 白腹棕尾蜂鸟（White-vented plumeleteer，学名 Chalybura buffonii），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联5个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括灌丛，主要威胁包括人类活动扰动。
nodes.shortSummary: 白腹棕尾蜂鸟（台湾作白臀尖嘴蜂鳥，学名：Chalybura buffonii），是雨燕目蜂鸟科的一种鸟类。 白腹棕尾蜂鸟体重约6.79克，翼长约63.9毫米，嘴峰长约26.7毫米，喙宽度约2.5毫米，喙厚度约2.6毫米，跗蹠长约4.4毫米，尾长约40.7毫米。白腹棕尾蜂鸟在其分…

nodes.name: 人类活动扰动
nodes.summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。

nodes.name: 白腹棕尾蜂鸟
nodes.summary: 白腹棕尾蜂鸟（Chalybura buffonii）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如白腹棕尾蜂鸟。

nodes.name: Chalybura
nodes.summary: Chalybura（Chalybura）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联2种鸟类，如斑胸棕尾蜂鸟、白腹棕尾蜂鸟。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: intermedia, southwestern Ecuador and northwestern Peru The white-vented plumeleteer inhabits a variety of landscapes including the edges and interiors of dry, moist, and wet forests, semi-open woodlands, secondary forest, and scrublands

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: intermedia, southwestern Ecuador and northwestern Peru The white-vented plumeleteer inhabits a variety of landscapes including the edges and interiors of dry, moist, and wet forests, semi-open woodlands, secondary forest, and scrublands

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: No immediate threats have been identified. It is considered uncommon to fairly common in most areas and seems to be able to tolerate some habitat disturbance
